# Reporting Security Issues

We take security vulnerabilities in **Cartographer** seriously and appreciate your efforts to report them responsibly. We are committed to acknowledging your contributions and responding quickly.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please report it via the GitHub Security Advisory feature:  
 [Report a Vulnerability](https://github.com/Edirom/cartographer-app/security/advisories/new)

Once we receive your report, we will:

- Acknowledge receipt promptly.
- Provide updates on our progress toward resolving the issue.
- Coordinate a fix and disclosure timeline.
- Request any additional information if needed.

Please **do not** publicly disclose the vulnerability until we have confirmed and addressed it.

For security issues in third-party dependencies, we recommend reporting directly to the maintainers of those projects.

## Supported Versions

Security updates are provided for the [latest official release](https://github.com/Edirom/cartographer-app/releases/latest) of Cartographer. We do not guarantee security patches for older versions.
